meaning: 非玩家角色（来自游戏），用来形容一个人像机器人一样缺乏原创想法，只会跟风或重复别人的话。

dialogue.text: He just said "it is what it is" for the third time...
She copied that TikTok caption word for word 😭

examples: Bro doesn't think for himself at all — he's got serious NPC energy.
Everyone in the comment section said the same thing. NPC convention over there.
